title: Authorized user creates a service and receives a code
description: An authorized user can create a service by entering client, equipment, assignment, and template data and then see the generated service code.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the new service section
Search for an existing client or create a new client
Fill in the equipment details
Select the service type
Select the common fault
Select the responsible area and technician
Select a task template
Set a valid estimated time
Submit the service form
Verify the generated service code is displayed
Verify the new service was created successfully

title: Collaborator completes a task with evidence and comment
description: A collaborator can mark a task complete, upload evidence, add a comment, and see the service progress update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /servicios
Open an assigned service from the list
Complete a task checklist item
Add a comment to the task
Attach evidence to the task
Verify the task is marked complete
Verify the service progress is updated

title: Collaborator finishes all tasks and completes the service
description: A collaborator can complete every task in an assigned service and see the service marked as completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an assigned service from the service list
Complete each task in the service checklist
Verify the service is marked as completed
Verify the progress is fully complete

title: Collaborator opens an assigned service and sees tracking details
description: A collaborator can open an assigned service and view the task checklist, progress, and estimated time information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an assigned service from the service list
Verify the service detail page is displayed
Verify the task checklist and progress information are displayed

title: Collaborator tracks time while working on a service
description: A collaborator can start, pause, and stop time tracking on an assigned service and see the elapsed time update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /servicios
Open an assigned service from the list
Start time tracking
Pause time tracking
Stop time tracking
Verify elapsed time is displayed
Verify tracking progress is updated

title: Admin reaches the dashboard after login
description: An admin can log in and land on the dashboard with role-appropriate performance overview content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify KPI and ranking content is displayed

title: Collaborator finishes the service
description: A collaborator can finish an assigned service after completing work and see the service move to the completed state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /servicios
Open an assigned service from the list
Finish the service
Verify the service is marked completed
Verify final elapsed-time summary is displayed

title: Collaborator starts and pauses time tracking on a task
description: A collaborator can start tracking time on a task and then pause it while the elapsed tracking state updates.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an assigned service from the service list
Start tracking time on a task
Pause tracking on the same task
Verify the task tracking state is paused
Verify elapsed time information is displayed

title: Collaborator opens an assigned service
description: A collaborator can open an assigned service from the service list and see the service detail page with tasks and tracking controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Navigate to /servicios
Open an assigned service from the list

title: Track and rate a completed service publicly
description: A client can enter a public service code, review the service details and visible evidence, and submit a rating with feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /seguimiento-cliente
Enter a valid service code
Submit the service code search
Select a rating of 5 stars
Fill in an optional comment
Submit the rating
Verify the service details are displayed
Verify a rating confirmation is visible

title: Admin reviews dashboard KPIs and ranking
description: An admin can open the dashboard, review the key operational metrics and collaborator ranking, and change the date range to see updated values.

Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field

title: New service appears in the service list after creation
description: After creating a service, the user can find it in the service list with a pending status.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Submit the login form
Click the new service section
Search for an existing client or create a new client
Fill in the equipment details
Select the service type
Select the common fault
Select the responsible area and technician
Select a task template
Set a valid estimated time
Submit the service form
Open the service list

title: Public user submits a service rating
description: A client can rate a completed public service with feedback and see the rating confirmation after submitting.

steps.description: Navigate to /seguimiento-cliente
Fill in a valid service code into the tracking field
Submit the tracking form
Select a rating from 1 to 5 stars
Fill in feedback into the comments field
Submit the rating form
Verify a rating confirmation is visible
Verify the submitted feedback is reflected in the public view

title: View a public service page and rate from service details
description: A client can open a public service page by code, review the visible evidence, and leave a rating and comment from the service detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /public/servicio/:codigo
Enter a valid service code
Submit the service code search
Review the service status and completion details
Select a rating from 1 to 5 stars
Fill in an optional suggestion
Submit the rating
Verify visible evidence is displayed
Verify a rating confirmation is visible

title: Public user submits a rating and feedback
description: A public user can rate a completed service from 1 to 5 stars and submit feedback successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /seguimiento-cliente
Enter a valid service code
Open the tracked service
Select a star rating
Fill in feedback comments
Submit the rating form
Verify the rating confirmation is visible
Verify the submitted feedback is recorded in the public view
